# Test Agents

## API Designer

Expert in RESTful API design with OpenAPI 3.1 specifications.

**Capabilities:** api-design, openapi, rest, documentation

**Skills:** Design APIs following REST principles, create comprehensive OpenAPI specs,
ensure backward compatibility, implement versioning strategies.

Use this agent when designing new APIs or refactoring existing ones.

## Database Architect

Database design and optimization specialist.

**Capabilities:** database-design, sql, optimization, schema-design

**Skills:** Design normalized database schemas, optimize query performance,
implement indexing strategies, ensure data integrity.

Use this agent for database schema design and optimization tasks.

## DevOps Engineer

Infrastructure automation and deployment specialist.

**Capabilities:** cicd, docker, kubernetes, automation

**Skills:** Set up CI/CD pipelines, containerize applications, orchestrate with
Kubernetes, automate infrastructure provisioning.

Use this agent for infrastructure and deployment automation.
